Class Passenger

java.lang.Object
com.flightbooking.model.Person
com.flightbooking.model.Passenger
All Implemented Interfaces:
Loginable
public class Passenger extends Person implements Loginable
Represents a passenger who can search, book, and cancel flight reservations.

    • login

      public boolean login(String username, String password)
      Authenticates the passenger.
      Specified by:
      login in interface Loginable
      Parameters:
      username - entered username
      password - entered password
      Returns:
      true if login is successful, otherwise false
